section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:

career-conditions (e.g. notice period), education and work experience,
professional knowledge, attached documents / attachments, if applicable, special
categories of data (e.g. if you have a disability or special needs), information
about your interview and notes on it, and additional information shared with us
during the application process.

categories of data (e.g. if you have a disability or special needs), information
about your interview and notes on it, and additional information shared with us
during the application process. We will obtain this data directly from you or – if a recruitment agency is
involved – directly from the agency.

Our website www.hetzner.com includes the AI-chatbot "Ask AI".

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text: You do not need to provide any personal data.
embed_text:
General

The chatbot collects and uses any and all information that you provide it with. You do not need to provide any personal data. To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data.
embed_text:
You do not need to provide any personal data. To increase the protection and security of your data, we use a tool that
automatically detects personal data. (Hereafter, we will refer to this tool as
the "PII tool"; "PII" is short for personally identifiable information.)

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
If you
(accidentally) enter personal data in the chatbot, the tool will automatically
recognize it and respond by asking you to enter your request/question again, but
this time without personal data.

transfers. Kapa.ai uses the enterprise version of ChatGPT (OpenAI OpCo LLC, San Francisco,
CA 94110, USA), which does not store personal data.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?
text:
How long will my data be saved?

After a customer account is deactivated, the following retention periods apply:

Without product usage: 3 years
With product usage (invoicing): 14 years (in accordance with tax and commercial
law retention obligations)
Unverified customer accounts: 14 days after the end of the failed verification
period

Once these periods have expired, your data will be archived in our long-term
backup systems.
embed_text:
Intrum acts as an
independent controller. How long will my data be saved?

After a customer account is deactivated, the following retention periods apply:

Without product usage: 3 years
With product usage (invoicing): 14 years (in accordance with tax and commercial
law retention obligations)
Unverified customer accounts: 14 days after the end of the failed verification
period

Once these periods have expired, your data will be archived in our long-term
backup systems. We are not obligated to actively delete data from backup systems.

4.11.1 Verification of customer details

To minimize our business risk and to prevent the misuse of our services, we
carry out a check based on general risk factors when new customer accounts are
registered. Our system makes a prediction about how likely it is that you will meet your
contractual payment obligations and use our services responsibly.

section: 4. How do we process your personal data?

experience and evaluated with the help of an external service provider for risk

cda-review@hetzner.com for this.

is completed. We are not required to inform you if your identity verification

responsibility for such notifications.

section: 5. What rights do I have when it comes to my data?

Right of access:
You can request information about your personal data by filing a formal request
through our online customer portal at accounts.hetzner.com using your verified
account login.

6. Making complaints to the relevant data protection authority

If you believe that we are not handling your data correctly, we encourage you
to contact our data protection officer directly. We always strive to resolve
any possible disagreements as quickly and smoothly as possible.
